## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (component, directive, or capability)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no behavior change)
- [ ] Chore / tooling / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (use `npm run commit`)
- [ ] `ng lint` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing (`npm test`, and `ng test --project @ngm-dev/mat-exp` for library changes)
- [ ] Docs updated (`public/docs/**`) if this changes public API, inputs/outputs, or usage
- [ ] Verified in the browser (`npm run build:lib && npm start`) — not just typechecked
